sentences.arabic: كَانَ الأُسْتَاذُ يَجْلِسُ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ وَيُعَلِّمُ الطُّلَّابَ.
sentences.translation: Učitelj je sjedio u džamiji i poučavao studente.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher used to sit in the mosque and teach the students.

sentences.translation: Studenti su sjeli oko njega i pažljivo slušali.
sentences.translationEn: The students sat around him and listened attentively.

sentences.translation: Podučavao ih je jeziku, računanju i historiji.
sentences.translationEn: He taught them language, arithmetic, and history.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الدَّرْسُ يَبْدَأُ بَعْدَ صَلَاةِ الصُّبْحِ.
sentences.translation: Čas je počinjao poslije jutarnje molitve.
sentences.translationEn: The lesson used to start after the morning prayer.
